title: Triggers: Web
text: Triggers: Web Web triggers are invoked by Uniface and executed in the client browser. They can only be used in Dynamic Server Page components. Most web triggers are widget-specific triggers that are activated in response to user events, but some triggers are activated in response to server events. Web triggers are declared with the webtrigger ProcScript statement. For more information, see webtrigger . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
